scripts.docs:diagrams: mmdc -p docs/media/puppeteer-config.json -i docs/media/architecture.mmd -o docs/media/architecture.svg && mmdc -p docs/media/puppeteer-config.json -i docs/media/data-flow.mmd -o docs/media/data-flow.svg
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:diagrams && vitepress build docs
scripts.docs:lint: markdownlint --config .markdownlint.json README.md CHANGELOG.md CONTRIBUTING.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md SUPPORT.md docs/**/*.md && vale --config=.vale.ini .
